news.t: VanEck Partners with Casa de Bolsa Finamex to Strengthen ETF Access in Mexico
ETFs with big Cisco stakes fall as network-equipment giant's stock set for worst day in 9 years
Best Tech ETFs For August As Sector Drives Growth In Markets
Best Performing Dividend ETF’s for Q1 2020

holdings.infoBox: TDIV is an equity ETF with a total of 97 individual holdings. The top holdings are Texas Instruments stock at 9.54%, Oracle at 8.13%, Broadcom at 8.03%, International Business Machines at 7.61%, and Microsoft at 6.68%.

overview.description: The First Trust NASDAQ Technology Dividend Index Fund (TDIV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ Technology Dividend index. The fund tracks a modified dividend-weighted index of US-listed technology companies that pay regular dividends. TDIV was launched on Aug 14, 2012 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: VanEck Partners with Casa de Bolsa Finamex to Strengthen ETF Access in Mexico
data.text: NEW YORK & MEXICO CITY--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announces strategic partnership for Casa de Bolsa Finamex to act as official liquidity provider for several VanEck ETFs cross-listed on the BMV.

data.title: ETFs with big Cisco stakes fall as network-equipment giant's stock set for worst day in 9 years
data.text: Shares of Cisco Systems Inc. CSCO, -11.20% slid more than 11% Thursday, on track for their worst day since February 2011, taking a few exchange-traded funds along with them.

data.title: Best Tech ETFs For August As Sector Drives Growth In Markets

data.title: Best Performing Dividend ETF’s for Q1 2020
data.text: The best dividend ETFs for Q1 2020 by 1-year return are ONEQ, YLCO, and TDIV.
